headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Vertex Pharmaceuticals’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals' first quarter results reflected balanced growth across its cystic fibrosis franchise and newly launched therapies, with management highlighting commercial momentum in both established and emerging product areas. CEO Reshma Kewalramani pointed to "strong revenue growth as we reach more patients with more products," emphasizing milestone achievements for AlifTrack, KASJEVY, and Gernavix.
